source: Improved Precision and Recall Metric for Assessing Generative Models.pdf

concepts.finding: Proposes improved precision and recall metrics for GANs that separately measure fidelity (quality) and diversity (coverage) using manifold-based estimation rather than single-number scores.
concepts.implication: Separating precision and recall for generative models is crucial for understanding tradeoffs. Similarly, search retrieval systems should separately measure precision (relevance) and recall (coverage).
concepts.open_question: How should precision-recall tradeoffs be measured in search systems where the relevant set is unknown?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A search evaluation framework that separately reports precision@k and recall@k will lead to better system design decisions than one reporting only NDCG or MRR.
